request_payload.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic analyst, I've seen firsthand how our alliances actually strengthen national security. Critics who push for isolationism often ignore how these partnerships deter aggression and share the burden of global threats. We can't afford to weaken our alliances while threats evolve. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
